applyTo: "**"
---

# Academic Research Memory Bank Workflow

Apply these instructions for all academic research tasks in this repository.

## 1) Bootstrap and Load (start of task)

- Resolve `PROJECT_ROOT` as git root (`.git`), else current working directory.
- Ensure `PROJECT_ROOT/memory-bank` exists.
- Ensure these files exist (create if missing):
  - `memory-bank/researchBrief.md`
  - `memory-bank/researchQuestions.md`
  - `memory-bank/literatureNotes.md`
  - `memory-bank/methodology.md`
  - `memory-bank/sourcesIndex.md`
  - `memory-bank/activeContext.md`
  - `memory-bank/progress.md`
  - `memory-bank/openQuestions.md`
- Read all required memory files before planning or execution.

## 2) Research Integrity Gates

- Treat `researchBrief.md`, `researchQuestions.md`, and `methodology.md` as source of truth for research direction and analysis plan.
- If ethics, consent, data permissions, citation status, or methodology constraints are unclear, stop and ask for clarification first.
- Do not fabricate citations, quotes, results, datasets, or methods.
- Do not store sensitive participant data, private datasets, credentials, or restricted full-text materials in memory files.

## 3) Operating Rules During Work

- Keep current research focus, blockers, and next steps in `activeContext.md`.
- Keep execution status in `progress.md`.
- Track literature themes, disagreements, gaps, and claims to verify in `literatureNotes.md`.
- Track methodology updates, analysis plan changes, validation checks, and limitations in `methodology.md`.
- Record source metadata and artifact references in `sourcesIndex.md`.
- Record unresolved research questions in `openQuestions.md`.

## 4) Required Updates Before Final Response

Update all of the following:
- `activeContext.md`
- `progress.md`
- `sourcesIndex.md` (if no source was reviewed, write `No new sources reviewed`)
- `openQuestions.md` (if no new question, write `No new open questions`)

Also update `researchBrief.md`, `researchQuestions.md`, `literatureNotes.md`, and `methodology.md` if new durable context was learned.

## 5) Output Contract

Final responses must include:
- `Memory bank: consulted and updated`
